title: selaginella weatherbiana
intro: Selaginella weatherbiana, also known as Chinese spikenard, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella weatherbiana include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
